title: T-027 — Test result recording + auto pass/fail vs spec compare
prompt:
# T-027 — Test result recording + spec compare

PRD: 09-QUALITY-PRD.md §6.3 quality_test_results, §11.2 V-QA-INSP-003..005
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Server Action `recordTestResult({inspection_id, parameter_id, measured_value?, measured_text?, notes?})` that auto-computes per-parameter result by comparing measured_value against quality_spec_parameters.target/min/max OR matching measured_text against attribute spec. Returns persisted row.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/src/server/quality/recordTestResult.ts` Server Action.
2. Loads parameter (with parameter_type, min/max/target). Compute result:
   - measurement/microbiological/chemical: pass if min<=measured<=max, else fail
   - attribute/visual: pass if measured_text matches expected pattern (case-insensitive trim), else fail
   - sensory: requires explicit pass/fail in input
   - equipment: equipment_id must be provided + within calibration window stub
3. Reject if inspection.status not in (assigned, in_progress) (V-QA-INSP-003 timing).
4. UPSERT (one row per (inspection_id, parameter_id)). Update inspection.samples_taken counter.

## Files
- apps/web/src/server/quality/recordTestResult.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/__tests__/recordTestResult.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a parameter type='measurement' with min=10, max=20, target=15, when recordTestResult({measured_value:18}) runs, then a row is upserted with result='pass'
2. Given the same parameter and measured_value=22, when recordTestResult runs, then result='fail'
3. Given an inspection with status='completed', when recordTestResult runs, then it rejects with V-QA-INSP-003 INVALID_STATE and writes nothing
4. Given a parameter type='attribute' with expected text='clear' and measured_text='Clear', when recordTestResult runs, then result='pass' (case-insensitive trim)

pipeline_inputs.description: Server Action recordTestResult with auto pass/fail compare against spec parameter; UPSERT per (inspection,parameter); state-machine guard.
pipeline_inputs.details: Server Action loads parameter type+limits and computes result per type-specific rule (numeric range, text match, sensory explicit, equipment calibration stub). UPSERT keyed by (inspection_id,parameter_id). Updates inspection.samples_taken. Rejects when inspection not in active state per V-QA-INSP-003. Tests cover numeric pass/fail, text match, state guard.
out_of_scope: Do not implement equipment calibration check beyond stub (cross-module 13-MAINT)
acceptance_criteria: Given a parameter type='measurement' with min=10, max=20, target=15, when recordTestResult({measured_value:18}) runs, then a row is upserted with result='pass'
Given the same parameter and measured_value=22, when recordTestResult runs, then result='fail'
Given an inspection with status='completed', when recordTestResult runs, then it rejects with V-QA-INSP-003 INVALID_STATE and writes nothing
Given a parameter type='attribute' with expected text='clear' and measured_text='Clear', when recordTestResult runs, then result='pass' (case-insensitive trim)
test_strategy: RED: write apps/web/src/server/quality/__tests__/recordTestResult.test.ts asserting numeric pass/fail, text match, state guard, UPSERT semantics
risk_red_lines: Do not let the client send a result value (server computes)
Do not allow recording when inspection.status is completed/cancelled
Do not duplicate rows per (inspection_id,parameter_id) — must UPSERT
